title: delphinium glareosum subsp. caprorum
intro: Delphinium glareosum subsp. caprorum, also known as the Capricorn delphinium, is a plant species in the delphinium genus, characterized by its tall spikes of fragrant flowers in shades of blue and white. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Research suggests that the plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its active compounds like alkaloids and glycosides. Herbal preparations of Delphinium glareosum subsp. caprorum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to support immune function and alleviate colds and flu.
